English: Believers Sword is a simple and powerful Bible app designed to help you grow in your faith daily. Read Scripture anytime, explore different translations, and stay consistent with your spiritual journey through an intuitive and distraction-free experience. Whether you're studying deeply or reflecting quietly, Believers Sword keeps God’s Word within reach.

- Ability to read bibles in Split views
- Ability to Bookmark
- Ability to add clip notes on bible verses
- Ability to create notes
- Ability to Highlight Notes
- Ability to Search
- Dictionary
- Prayer List
- Sermons Page
- Beutiful Customizable Appearance Theme
multiple bible versions to choose from
clip a note to a verse
Stay connected to God’s Word anytime, anywhere. Believers Sword makes Bible reading simple, focused, and meaningful.
